sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Sisar tungah A Zu Khan

verses.text: Tua gam a uk dingin Festas hong tun'zawh ni thum ciangin Sisaria khua panin Jerusalem khua-ah a va zin hi

Tua lai panin siampi liante leh Jew upate in Paul a mawhsakna thu uh ama kiangah na gen uh hi. Amaute in lamkalah Paul thatlum nuam uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua-ah Paul a paisakna dingin Festas kiangah nakpi takin a thum uh hi
Festas in, “Sisaria khua-ah Paul kikhum a, kei zong ciahkik baih ding ka hih manin
Paul in khialhna khat peuhpeuh gamta kha ahih leh zong ama khialhna thu a gen dingin na makaite un kei hong zui uh hen,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua lai-ah Festas ni giat, ni sawm bang a taam khit ciangin Sisaria khua-ah a ciah hi. A zing ciangin thukhen tokhom tungah tu a, ama mai-ah Paul a kipaipihna dingin thu a pia hi

Paul hong kipaipih ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Jew mite in amah umcih a, thu lianpipi tawh Paul a mawhsakna uh tampi gen uh a, ahi zongin a mawhsaknate uh man hi, ci-in a lahtel theih uh bangmah omlo hi
Paul in, “Jew mite' Thukham ahi a, Rom gam uk kumpipa tungah ahi zongin ka khialhna bangmah om hetlo hi,” ci-in a kisut hi
Jew mite' pahtak ding ut ahih manin Festas in Paul kiangah, “Jerusalem khua-ah va pai-in, keima mai mahah hih thute tawh kisai-in thusitna hong kinei leh na ut hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin

Paul in, “Keimah thu hong kisitna ding munin a kilawmna, gam uk kumpipa thukhenna mai-ah ka va ding ding hi. Nangmahmah in zong teltakin na theihding bangmahin Jew mite tungah bangmah siatna ka bawl kei hi

Thukham palsatin sihna thuakna ding thu khat peuhpeuh a gamta hi leng, suahtakna ding thu ka gen het kei ding hi. Hih amaute' hong mawhzon'nate a manlo ahih leh zong kuamah in amaute' khutsungah hong ap zolo ding uh hi. Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu ka khan hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Festas in, “Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin na hih manin ama kiangah na pai ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Festas in Agrippa kiangah Paul' Thu Gen

verses.text: Tua zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin gam uk kumpipa' khutnuai mahah a uksawn Agrippa leh a sanggamnu Bernis, a hong tung thak Festas kiangah a hawh dingin Sisaria khua-ah a hong pai uh hi
Tawlkhat a taam khit uh ciangin Festas in tua kumpipa' kiangah Paul' thu gen a, “Feliks in thong sunga a na nusiat mi khat hih lai-ah a om hi
Jerusalem khua-ah ka va pai ciangin Jew siampi liante leh upate in amah a mawhsakna uh thu tampi gen uh a, amah mawhsakin thu ka khenna ding hong gen uh hi

Ahi zongin ke'n ka dawn'na-ah, ‘Mi khat peuhpeuh in mawhsakna a thuak ciangin, mawhsakna a thuakpa leh a mawhsakte maitang kimu-in thu kisel a, mawhsakna a thuakpa in amah a kiphel theihna ding thugenna hun a ngah matengin, mawhsak thukhenna piakding pen Rom ngeina hilo hi,’ ka ci hi
Ka cih mah bangin hih lai-ah amaute a hong tun' uh a zing ciangin thukhenna tokhom tungah tu pahin, a mipa hong kipaipihna dingin thu ka pia hi
Alangte hong ding uh a, a mawhna a lianpipi hong gen ding uh hi, ci-in ka up leh, tua bang hong hilo hi
Amau' thu kituhna pen amau' biakna thu, leh a si khinsa hinapi-in Paul in, ‘Hing hi,’ a cih Jesuh' thu peuh na hi lel hi
Hih bang thu ka kankhiatna dingzia theilo ka hih manin Paul kiangah, ‘Hih thute tawh kisai-in thu kisit dingin Jerusalem-ah va pai lecin na ut hiam?’ ci-in ka dot leh amah utlo hi

Amah in a zu khan a, thong mahah kikoih lai-in gam uk kumpipa in ama thu a khensakna ding a ngen hi. Tua ahih manin gam uk kumpipa kiangah ka puakkhiat theih mateng thong sungah a khumna dingun thu ka pia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Keimahmah in hih mipa' thugen zanuam ing,” a cih ciangin, “Zing ciangin na za ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ahih manin a zing ciangin a thupi takin lian bawl mahmahna tawh Agrippa leh Bernis hong pai uh a, galkapmangte leh khuasung uliante tawh kikhopna inn lianpi sungah a hong lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Festas in Paul hong kitumpihna dingin thu a pia hi

Tua ciangin Festas in, “Kumpi Agrippa leh hih lai-a om mi khempeuh aw, hih lai khua hita leh Jerusalem khua-ah hita leh Jew mi khempeuh in kei tungah amah mawhsakna thu hong gen uh hih mipa na mu uh hi. Hih mipa hin'khawi ding kilawm lo hi, ci-in amaute awnggawp uh hi
Ahi zongin sihna thuakna dingin ama gamtat khialhna bangmah ka mu het kei hi. Amahmah in gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin ahih manin kumpipa kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsutsa ahi hi

Ahi zongin kumpipa tungah bangteng taktak gelh ding cih ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih manin ama thu a kikan khit ciangin ka gelhding thu ka theihna dingin note mai-ah, a diakdiakin kumpipa Agrippa mai-ah amah kong paipih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna hih bangteng hi, ci-in gentelna omlopi-in thongkia mi khat, kumpipa kiangah ka puakding, a thu kicing ka sa zo kei hi,” a ci hi.
